decisions.secondary_gap_note: our SHA is on The-OpenROAD-Project staging fork (different history from parallaxsw); compare against The-OpenROAD-Project master only; parallaxsw is upstream-of-upstream and is folded in via merge PRs (e.g. #357 sta_update_latest_0505 on 2026-05-12)
decisions.bump_rationale: Pin is 3 commits (<10) behind The-OpenROAD-Project master; post-pin diff is bazel-build plumbing only (libertybuilder export for 3DIC/dbsta + ODR/mac fixups), no STA-engine semantic changes. We consume OpenSTA via OpenROAD's CMake path, not Bazel, so the deltas are inert for our build.

decisions.v5_050_status: not yet cut; verilator follows even-numbered stable tags (v5.046, v5.048, ...); next stable expected v5.050
decisions.bump_rationale: v5.050 not yet tagged as of 2026-05-20. Our 5.049-devel snapshot is mid-cycle (46 commits past v5.048); upstream master is +107 from v5.048. Bumping to a raw master SHA would lose the OSS-CAD-Suite curated bundle and gain only in-flight fixes (e.g. #7616 unique_index, #7615 type-param order). Wait for v5.050 tag, then bump the whole oss-cad-suite drop together.
decisions.upgrade_path_when_tagged: Pull next oss-cad-suite nightly that includes Verilator v5.050; replace external/oss-cad-suite/ atomically; do not hand-swap the verilator binary inside the bundle.

post_pin_master_wins: general peripheral fixes since Feb 2026 stable

watch_pr_879.title: cosim: multi-instance DPI support and IRQ preemption of sync_time
watch_pr_879.note: still open; not yet merged into master. Required for our multi-core cosim plan but no progress in ~5 weeks.

decisions.bump_rationale: v1.16.1 (Feb 2026) is still the latest stable release; no v1.16.2 or v1.17.x cut. Master is +448 commits but contains no tagged stable cut and no merged cosim multi-instance support (PR #879 still open). Staying on the stable portable build keeps reproducibility; cherry-picking master would forfeit the dotnet_portable bundle.
watch_prs: renode/renode#879 cosim multi-instance DPI (open, blocking for our multi-core cosim)
